title: Angelini Pharma Acquires Catalyst for $4.1B
headline: Italy's Angelini Pharma is acquiring Catalyst Pharmaceuticals for $4.1 billion, gaining Firdapse (amifampridine) for Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome as part of accelerating M&A pace in 2026.
key_facts: $4.1 billion acquisition price; Firdapse (amifampridine) for Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome; fourth biotech acquisition in May 2026

title: Atara Surges 35-48% on FDA Path for Tab-cel
headline: Atara Biotherapeutics (ATRA) stock jumped 35-48% after FDA Type A meeting opened resubmission path for tab-cel (tabelecleucel), an allogeneic T-cell therapy for EBV-positive post-transplant lymphoproliferative disease.
key_facts: Stock up 35.53%-47.57% intraday May 7; Type A FDA meeting held; BLA resubmission pathway opened; prior rejection in January 2026

title: Entrada Stock Falls on DMD Phase 1/2 Data
headline: Entrada Therapeutics (TRDA) stock declined despite announcing 'positive topline data' from Cohort 1 of Phase 1/2 ELEVATE-44-201 study of ENTR-601-44 in Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
key_facts: Phase 1/2 ELEVATE-44-201 study; double-blind, placebo-controlled MAD portion; Cohort 1 topline data

title: Sarepta Tumbles as Gene Therapy Sales Decline
headline: Sarepta Therapeutics stock fell as Elevidys (delandistrogene moxeparvovec) gene therapy sales continued declining.
key_facts: Elevidys sales declining; no specific revenue figures disclosed

title: Roche Acquires PathAI for Over $1B
headline: Roche is acquiring digital pathology company PathAI for potentially over $1 billion to integrate AI-driven diagnostic tools for cancer diagnosis and tailored treatment.
key_facts: Deal value potentially over $1 billion; digital pathology AI platform

title: EnGene Shares Crash on Bladder Cancer Data
headline: EnGene shares crashed following updated pivotal bladder cancer data announcement.
key_facts: Updated pivotal bladder cancer data; specific data points not disclosed

title: Amazon Adds Ozempic Pill to Same-Day Kiosks
headline: Amazon is now offering oral semaglutide (Novo Nordisk's Rybelsus/Wegovy pill formulation) through same-day prescription drug kiosks, expanding GLP-1 distribution.
key_facts: Oral semaglutide; same-day prescription kiosks; Novo's Wegovy pill posted $355M Q1 2026 sales

title: FDA Rebukes Alnylam Over Amvuttra Claims
headline: FDA issued an untitled letter rebuking Alnylam Pharmaceuticals for efficacy claims made on the Amvuttra (vutrisiran) website.
key_facts: Untitled letter issued May 7, 2026; website efficacy claims violation

title: Blackstone Invests $250M in Anagram
headline: Blackstone committed $250 million to Anagram, a startup developing treatments for cystic fibrosis complications.
key_facts: $250 million investment; cystic fibrosis complications focus

title: Eli Lilly Announces $4.5B Manufacturing Investment
headline: Eli Lilly is investing $4.5 billion in new manufacturing capacity across Indiana to support obesity drug and GLP-1 production.
key_facts: $4.5 billion manufacturing investment; Indiana facilities; GLP-1/obesity drug capacity

title: Mirum Hits Primary Endpoint in PSC Phase 2b Study
headline: Mirum Pharmaceuticals (MIRM) met primary endpoint in VISTAS Phase 2b study of volixibat (oral IBAT inhibitor) for primary sclerosing cholangitis; stock up 16.9%.
key_facts: VISTAS Phase 2b study; primary endpoint met; stock gained 16.9%; oral IBAT inhibitor; announcement May 4 still moving markets May 7
